title: Using you-agent-factory for Loops
description: Run iterative factory loops that keep work cycling until a goal is done.
openingSummary: This guide covers using you-agent-factory for loops: iterative factory work that keeps cycling until a goal is done.

whatItIs.title: What It Is
whatItIs.body: A factory loop is iterative work under you-agent-factory that keeps cycling until the goal is done.

whenToUse.title: When To Use
whenToUse.body: Use this guide when a goal needs repeated agent passes under a live factory.

stepsOrWorkflow.title: Steps Or Workflow
stepsOrWorkflow.body: Confirm a live factory, start or continue a named run, submit work that iterates, and check progress.

commonPitfalls.title: Common Pitfalls
commonPitfalls.body: Do not submit without a live factory session, and do not treat a loop as a one-shot chat.
